steps.title: Use the requested example
steps.content: The student wants an example of a poem by Charles Bertram Johnson. The relevant note is that Old Things is a poem by Johnson and was published in March 1923.

steps.title: Name the poem
steps.content: Choice A describes Johnson's roles but gives no poem. Choice B says he published poetry in The Crisis but does not identify a specific poem. Choice D describes the magazine, not Johnson's work. The remaining choice provides the requested poem example. The answer is C.
